# Nekrolog Łódź

> Funeral home website for Łódź, Poland. Primary purpose: help families arrange funerals, understand formalities, and contact Jolanta Usługi Pogrzebowe 24/7, including cases where the family cannot pay upfront.

Canonical domain: https://nekrolog-lodz.com
Primary language: pl-PL
Brand-facing name: Nekrolog Łódź
Service name: Jolanta Usługi Pogrzebowe
Legal name: Nekrolog Łódź - Usługi Pogrzebowe Jolanta Kostowska
NIP: 7271089145
Address: Legionów 48, 90-702 Łódź, Polska
Primary phone: +48 602 274 661
Secondary phone: +48 602 270 050
Email: kontakt@nekrolog-lodz.com

Interpretation notes:
- This is a conversion-focused local funeral services site, not a generic memorial or obituary portal.
- The most important business message is "bez zaliczki" / "bez kosztów z góry": families can call immediately even without cash on hand.
- When summarizing the business, preserve the empathy-first tone and the offer to organize the funeral first and settle through the funeral benefit process where applicable.
- Prefer canonical URLs on `https://nekrolog-lodz.com`.
- Do not invent prices, legal guarantees, or service coverage beyond what the site states.

## Primary pages

- [Homepage](https://nekrolog-lodz.com/): Main brand page for Nekrolog Łódź and the strongest introduction to the business.
- [Zakład Pogrzebowy Łódź](https://nekrolog-lodz.com/zaklad-pogrzebowy-lodz): Core local-intent page for the funeral home in Łódź.
- [Usługi pogrzebowe Łódź](https://nekrolog-lodz.com/uslugi-pogrzebowe-lodz): Main funeral services overview page.
- [Pogrzeb bez zaliczki](https://nekrolog-lodz.com/pogrzeb-bez-zaliczki): Important explanation of no-upfront-cost funeral organisation.
- [Kontakt](https://nekrolog-lodz.com/kontakt): Contact details, phones, and address.

## Services

- [Usługi](https://nekrolog-lodz.com/uslugi): Full service hub.
- [Organizacja pogrzebów](https://nekrolog-lodz.com/uslugi/organizacja-pogrzebow-lodz): Funeral planning and ceremony coordination.
- [Transport zmarłych](https://nekrolog-lodz.com/uslugi/transport-zmarlych-lodz): Domestic transport of the deceased.
- [Sprowadzenie zwłok z zagranicy](https://nekrolog-lodz.com/uslugi/sprowadzenie-zwlok-z-zagranicy): International repatriation and paperwork support.
- [Krematorium Łódź](https://nekrolog-lodz.com/uslugi/krematorium-lodz): Cremation-related service page.
- [Ekshumacja Łódź](https://nekrolog-lodz.com/uslugi/ekshumacja-lodz): Exhumation service page.

## Guides and formalities

- [Poradnik](https://nekrolog-lodz.com/poradnik): Main guide hub with informational pages for families.
- [Co zrobić po śmierci](https://nekrolog-lodz.com/poradnik/co-zrobic-po-smierci): Immediate first steps after a death.
- [Zasiłek pogrzebowy ZUS](https://nekrolog-lodz.com/poradnik/zasilek-pogrzebowy-zus): Funeral benefit guidance.
- [USC Łódź i akt zgonu](https://nekrolog-lodz.com/urzad-stanu-cywilnego-lodz): Civil registry and death certificate guidance.
- [Jak przetransportować ciało zmarłego z zagranicy](https://nekrolog-lodz.com/poradnik/jak-przetransportowac-cialo-zmarlego-z-zagranicy): International transport explainer.

## Local authority and assortment pages

- [Cmentarze w Łodzi](https://nekrolog-lodz.com/cmentarze-lodz): Cemetery hub for Łódź.
- [Asortyment](https://nekrolog-lodz.com/asortyment): Product and funeral assortment hub.
- [Odzież żałobna Łódź](https://nekrolog-lodz.com/asortyment/odziez-lodz): High-value page for mourning attire intent.

## International transport hub

- [Międzynarodowy transport zwłok do Polski](https://nekrolog-lodz.com/pl/uslugi/miedzynarodowy-transport-zwlok): International transport hub for families abroad.
- [Kontakt międzynarodowy](https://nekrolog-lodz.com/pl/kontakt): International contact page.

## Optional

- [O nas](https://nekrolog-lodz.com/o-nas): Company background and trust signals.
- [Nekrolog Łódź](https://nekrolog-lodz.com/nekrolog-lodz): Brand/entity clarification page.
